title: Simi Valley Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Simi Valley with a Z-Score of +3.46. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Simi Valley is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 16.8 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, which is typical for a heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
